_comment: Plugin MCP wiring. The write-capable ad platforms (Google Ads + Meta Ads) use Pipeboard's hosted MCP servers, which speak Claude's native remote-MCP OAuth flow: the marketer clicks Connect, signs in with their own Google/Meta account, and Pipeboard brokers the platform OAuth WITHOUT ever seeing the credentials and WITHOUT any Google Ads developer-token application. This is true per-user auth, which is what the spend-gate relies on. Google Drive is NOT wired here - it lives in Claude desktop's native Connectors catalog (Customize -> Connectors -> Google Drive). NOTE on why this is not Composio: Claude desktop's Connect button only performs an OAuth handshake and has no field for an x-api-key / Bearer header (anthropics/claude-ai-mcp #112). Composio's hosted MCP endpoints authenticate with an x-api-key header, so they cannot be authorized from the Connect button - that mismatch caused the dynamic-client-registration failures. GA4 / Search Console / Tag Manager / Merchant Center do not yet have a verified OAuth MCP wired (see _pending_connectors below and CONNECTORS.md).

notion._comment: Optional. Briefs, playbooks in Notion. Vendor-native MCP.

supabase._comment: Already in use. Portfolio-site product/usage data. Vendor-native MCP.

vercel._comment: Already in use. Inspect deployments / scheduled data-pull jobs. Vendor-native MCP.

slack._comment: Optional. Share finished reports as messages. Vendor-native MCP.

_pending_connectors._comment: NOT wired yet - do NOT ship guessed URLs. Each needs a verified OAuth MCP endpoint (one a marketer can authorize from Claude desktop's Connect button) chosen and tested before team rollout. Candidates are listed for evaluation; once a URL is confirmed working in Claude desktop, move the entry up into mcpServers. See CONNECTORS.md section 'Pending connectors' for the decision log.

candidates: self-hosted google-analytics-mcp with Advanced-settings OAuth client ID

google-tag-manager.purpose: WRITE-CAPABLE: read containers/tags/triggers, create/edit, publish versions. Conversion-tracking changes are Tier 1 in the spend-gate.
google-tag-manager.note: No verified Connect-button OAuth MCP confirmed yet. Until one is wired, Tier-1 GTM tracking edits via /ad-actions are unavailable. Block team rollout of GTM writes until verified.

google-merchant-center.purpose: WRITE-CAPABLE: feed health, product attributes, supplemental feeds, promotions. Only relevant for brands running Shopping/PMax with a product feed.
google-merchant-center.note: Candidate fallback: the official Google Content API via a self-hosted MCP with Advanced-settings OAuth client ID.

_custom_connectors_note: Google Search Console and Google Ads are NOT plugin servers — Claude desktop's plugin/in-session OAuth flow is buggy (no localhost callback listener; 'a server with this URL already exists'). Marketers add them as CUSTOM CONNECTORS, which use Claude's hosted callback (claude.ai/api/mcp/auth_callback) and work. URLs: GSC = https://onlineminds-gsc-mcp.fly.dev/mcp ; Google Ads = https://onlineminds-gads-mcp.fly.dev/mcp . Both support DCR, so no Client ID/Secret to paste. See CONNECTORS.md and the setup guide. Meta Ads is ALSO a custom connector, but Meta-hosted (https://mcp.meta.com/ads/<business-id>) — Facebook login, free beta, no self-hosting. One URL per Business Manager, minted at Meta's Connect-to-AI page; the per-company URLs are stored in account-conventions-live.
